goal: 补齐对话调试与 dogfood 调用链观测

summary.title: 补齐对话调试观测链
summary.what: 在 kernel runLoop 里新增 runtime observability callback，记录 chat run、LLM request/response、tool call started/succeeded/failed 等调用链事件；MV3 runtime services 将事件转发到 background，background 复用现有 observability export buffers，让 resource.read 能读回 observability.timeline 和 observability.rawEventTail。新增 dogfood 回归测试，并在 AI Surface 文档说明当前对话 debug API。
summary.why: 用户要求先把开发环境做成 debug 友好，尤其要能看见对话后端的一切调用路径，并参考旧项目已有 debug API。当前仓已有 shared resource 面，但 chat backend path 没有把 LLM 与 tool 调用链写入该面；本轮把缺口收口到现有 AI Surface，而不是重新引入旧仓 HTTP debug server。
summary.user_goal: 补齐对话调试与 dogfood 调用链观测

decisions.point: 对话调试 API 边界
decisions.chose: 复用 shared bridge 的 resource.read 读取 observability.timeline、observability.rawEventTail、runtime.history、audit.tail 和 runtime.capture_diagnostics。
decisions.rationale: vNext 当前没有旧仓 bridge HTTP server；现有 AI Surface resource 是 operator-facing truth，接入这里能让 UI、agent 和测试共享同一读面。
rejected: 为本轮重新增加一套 HTTP debug endpoint

decisions.chose: 在 packages/kernel/src/loop-orchestrator.ts 的 runLoop 内产生 LLM/tool/run lifecycle 事件，并通过 callback 交给 MV3 background 存储。
decisions.rationale: runLoop 拥有真实 backend 调用路径、route、payload summary、tool execution result 和 terminal status；background 只负责持久化/投影，避免 app-local 反推调用链。

decisions.chose: 用 runtime.chat.send 触发真实 background bridge path，再用 resource.read 读回 observability resources。
decisions.rationale: 这符合 cxs-dogfood 的自喂养目标：项目用自己的 bridge/API 面测试自己的 debug 可观测性，而不是只检查内部函数。

decisions.chose: raw event 和 details 进入 observability 前递归脱敏 key/token/secret/password/authorization 等字段，并限制字符串、数组和对象深度。
decisions.rationale: debug surface 需要足够细节，但不能把 llmKey 或类似凭据泄露进 raw tail。

review_notes: 验证：./node_modules/.bin/biome check packages/kernel/src/loop-orchestrator.ts apps/mv3-shell/src/runtime-services.ts apps/mv3-shell/src/background.ts apps/mv3-shell/test/runtime-chat.spec.ts docs/ai-surface-index.md 通过。
验证：bun test apps/mv3-shell/test/runtime-chat.spec.ts packages/kernel/test/loop-orchestrator.spec.ts 通过，73 tests / 298 expects。
验证：bun run typecheck 通过，其中 typecheck:mv3-bridge 的 mv3 gate 测试 2 passed / 95 skipped。
验证：git diff --check 与 git diff --cached --check 均通过。

architectural_claims: Conversation debug visibility is part of the shared AI Surface resource read path, not an MV3-private helper.
The kernel run loop is the source of truth for LLM request/response and tool-call observability events.
behavioral_changes: A chat run now emits runtime.chat.run.started and runtime.chat.run.finished timeline/raw events.
Each LLM request and parsed response now emits runtime.llm.request.* and runtime.llm.response.succeeded observability events with route/model/message/tool counts and timing.
Each tool call now emits runtime.tool.call.started plus succeeded/failed events with capability id, action, duration, result summary, and raw tail evidence.
MV3 resource.read for observability.timeline and observability.rawEventTail can now show the conversation backend path after runtime.chat.send.

api_changes.signature: RunLoopInput.onObservabilityEvent(event: ObservabilityTimelineEvent, rawEvent?: Omit<RawEventTailEntry, "index">): void | Promise<void>
resource.read observability.timeline / observability.rawEventTail now include runtime chat LLM and tool-call events

security_implications: Observability payloads are recursively sanitized before export; fields matching key/token/secret/password/authorization patterns are redacted.
Raw event payload size/depth is bounded to reduce accidental oversharing and unbounded debug data growth.
migration_notes: The old repository's bridge debug HTTP endpoints are not reintroduced; the current equivalent is shared MV3 resource.read over existing AI Surface resources.
